title: Resume
text:
Experience
KPMG — Insurance Advisory Intern
Jul. 2024 – Jan. 2025

Supported an IFRS 17 finance implementation project
Built working papers for COA design, journal entry mapping, and disclosure mapping
Processed and reconciled datasets in Excel to support impact analysis and client presentations

CITIC Securities — Business Analysis Intern
Apr. 2024 – Jun. 2024

Researched China’s coffee market, including competition, industry trends, and value chain structure
Built a market analysis database using industry data and company information
Conducted survey analysis and created data visualizations for market insights

Guotai Junan Asset Management — Real Estate Investment Group Intern
Jan. 2024 – Apr. 2024

Assisted with ABS and REITs project materials and filings
Supported financial data analysis, cash flow forecasting, and fund structuring
Conducted industry research and contributed to work drafts and reports

Soochow Securities — Industry Research Intern
Jul. 2023 – Oct. 2023

Conducted financial analysis of listed companies
Organized and benchmarked company data using Wind and Excel
Prepared meeting notes and tracked market developments

title: About
text:
I am currently pursuing a Master in Business Analytics at the University of California San Diego. Before UC San Diego, I studied Finance at Shanghai Jiao Tong University and completed a minor in Business Data Science.
My academic background has given me training in business analytics, machine learning, optimization, finance, and data analysis. I am especially interested in applying analytical methods to real business problems.

title: About
text:
I am currently pursuing a Master in Business Analytics at the University of California San Diego. Before UC San Diego, I studied Finance at Shanghai Jiao Tong University and completed a minor in Business Data Science.
My academic background has given me training in business analytics, machine learning, optimization, finance, and data analysis. I am especially interested in applying analytical methods to real business problems.

title: About
text:
Professional Interests
I am interested in marketing analytics, experimentation, market research, and data-driven decision making. Through previous internships, I have worked on projects involving financial analysis, market analysis, reporting, data reconciliation, and industry research.
